data.title: Write RED integration tests for figma-merge.py CLI: FP-MERGE and FP-LINK end-to-end
data.description:
## What
Create tests/integration/fixtures/figma-merge/ fixture directory and write tests/integration/test-figma-merge-integration.sh with end-to-end integration tests for the figma-merge.py CLI.

## testing_mode: RED — tests must FAIL until figma-merge.py is implemented (T10).

## Fixture directory to create
tests/integration/fixtures/figma-merge/
  - original/spatial-layout.json (original pre-revision manifest with EXISTING components)
  - original/wireframe.svg (matching SVG with same component IDs)
  - original/tokens.md (matching tokens with behavioral specs for some components)
  - figma-revised-spatial.json (Figma-derived new spatial-layout with: 1 added component, 1 removed COMPLETE-spec component, 1 modified position)

## Test Cases (Given/When/Then)
- FP-MERGE-INT-1: Given fixture manifests and revised Figma spatial-layout, when figma-merge.py --non-interactive runs, then exit 0 and output spatial-layout.json has the modified component's new position
- FP-MERGE-INT-2: Given same fixtures, when figma-merge.py --non-interactive runs, then the designer-added component appears in output with tag=NEW and designer_added=true
- FP-MERGE-INT-3: Given the COMPLETE-spec component is removed in Figma revision, when figma-merge.py --non-interactive runs, then stderr contains WARN text about COMPLETE behavioral spec removal
- FP-MERGE-INT-4: Given a confirmation prompt (no --non-interactive), when the user inputs 'n', then figma-merge.py exits non-zero and no output files are written
- FP-LINK-INT-1: Given a deliberately inconsistent fixture (component in spatial-layout.json not in SVG), when figma-merge.py runs, then exits 1 with ID-linkage error

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/integration/test-figma-merge-integration.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/integration/test-figma-merge-integration.sh
- [ ] Contains FP-MERGE-INT-1 through FP-MERGE-INT-4 and FP-LINK-INT-1
  Verify: for t in FP-MERGE-INT-1 FP-MERGE-INT-2 FP-MERGE-INT-3 FP-MERGE-INT-4 FP-LINK-INT-1; do grep -q "$t" tests/integration/test-figma-merge-integration.sh || exit 1; done
- [ ] tests/integration/fixtures/figma-merge/ directory exists with all 4 fixture files
  Verify: for f in original/spatial-layout.json original/wireframe.svg original/tokens.md figma-revised-spatial.json; do test -f tests/integration/fixtures/figma-merge/$f || exit 1; done
- [ ] Running tests exits non-zero (RED — figma-merge.py not yet implemented)
  Verify: bash tests/integration/test-figma-merge-integration.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
